rows.current_resolution: The positive 1:1 mode-ticket thesis has been reframed as a scoped negative support-equivalence paper.
rows.key_numbers: paper title and roadmap both state the negative posterior-mode resolution
rows.remaining_gap: Venue editing can tighten wording, but the claim direction is settled in the current draft.

rows.proposal_item: H1: lottery tickets correspond one-to-one to posterior modes
rows.current_resolution: Falsified under the current support-distribution and direct mode/ticket tests.
rows.key_numbers: posterior>random 58/59; posterior>chain by >0.005 0/59; rewind>posterior by >0.005 55/57; direct CIFAR sample rows one-cluster 7/7, layer-KS failures 7/7, hamming failures 6/7
rows.remaining_gap: Exact dense full-covariance CIFAR posterior evidence is infeasible locally and remains bounded rather than closed.

rows.proposal_item: H2: posterior mode count determines ticket diversity
rows.current_resolution: Unsupported: full-data direct posterior rows collapse to one posterior basin while IMP keeps seed-level ticket diversity.
rows.key_numbers: direct sample rows with one posterior cluster 7/7; LowRank128Lap p=1.98e-06, hamming=0.8163; JointDiag270k p=1.09e-08, hamming=0.0000
rows.remaining_gap: A different exact posterior method could be proposed, but current covariance-fidelity trend does not point toward rescue.

rows.proposal_item: H3: variational mode-finding pruning should match accuracy and improve calibration
rows.current_resolution: Partially implemented and negative for the paper claim: variational pruning can lower ECE but loses accuracy, Brier, OOD AUROC, and ticket support.
rows.key_numbers: digits variational accuracy-IMP -0.0078; digits support-to-IMP 0.3822; CIFAR variational acc/AUROC 0.8301/0.7754 vs IMP 0.8953/0.8306
rows.remaining_gap: Do not expand into a broad pruning benchmark unless reviewers ask; the current baseline is enough for the scoped negative claim.

rows.proposal_item: H4: random-weight networks as prior mode finding
rows.current_resolution: Bounded by learned-mask controls rather than developed into a separate Ramanujan-style study.
rows.key_numbers: full-data learned-mask support-to-IMP: gem_miner=0.0917, variational_prune=0.0907, hard_concrete=0.0922; IMP accuracy 0.8983
rows.remaining_gap: A full random-weight-network replication is de-scoped; the submitted paper should state this as out of scope.

rows.current_resolution: Covered across stochastic samplers, SWAG, Laplace variants, subspace HMC, and covariance-fidelity audits.
rows.key_numbers: movement samplers=DiagLap, KFACLap, LowRank128Lap, LowRank32Lap, LowRank64Lap, LowRankLap, SGHMC, SGLD, SWAG20, cSGLD; covariance movement rows=9; direct rows=2; dense full covariance memory=553.1466 GiB
rows.remaining_gap: Literal dense full-covariance CIFAR posterior is outside the single-workstation memory budget.

rows.proposal_item: Proposal metrics: KS, MMD, Wasserstein, Hamming, CKA, Hungarian, basin entropy
rows.current_resolution: Implemented in direct mode/ticket distribution probes and summarized into paper statistics.
rows.key_numbers: required direct metric keys present in the current CIFAR direct rows
rows.remaining_gap: Metric interpretation should remain explicit: function-space CKA alone is not enough for H1.

rows.current_resolution: First-order activation/weight alignment is negative; saved-artifact record matching and global channel audits bound the post-hoc issue.
rows.key_numbers: aligned rows fail layer-KS=True; global channel supported=True; stage-1 exact assignments=128; full search log10 assignments=840.4
rows.remaining_gap: Exhaustive full-data graph/channel search is infeasible and unimplemented.

rows.current_resolution: Venue triage is now explicit: TMLR (rolling) is the primary target with a fully prepared local packet, ICLR 2027 and AISTATS 2027 are high-visibility backups, and faster CIKM/EMNLP deadlines are rejected unless the paper is substantially rescoped.
rows.remaining_gap: Author OpenReview/COI/ethics confirmations and the external CUDA-host GPU-container receipt must still be recorded before TMLR upload; official ICLR 2027 CFP/Author Guide observation remains the backup-venue blocker.

rows.current_resolution: Local TMLR and ICLR-style manuscript packets, OpenReview paste packets, anonymous archive, source snapshot, locked final-test, full-CIFAR BN policy ablations, saved-artifact reruns, and the TinyCNN architecture-generality cell are ready; remaining blockers are author OpenReview profile/COI/ethics/LLM confirmations, formal external plagiarism screening, and public release/CI/GPU receipts (all external/author actions).
rows.remaining_gap: iclr_2027_official_cfp_not_observed, iclr_2027_official_author_guide_not_observed, iclr_openreview_author_profile_and_coi_not_recorded, iclr_openreview_submission_receipt_not_observed, iclr_code_of_ethics_author_acknowledgement_not_recorded, llm_usage_disclosure_author_confirmation_not_recorded, public_release_archive_smoke_not_ready, public_release_upload_not_verified, public_repository_state_not_verified, external_ci_run_not_observed, external_gpu_container_run_not_observed, formal_external_plagiarism_database_screen_not_performed, public_release_archive_smoke_not_ready, public_release_upload_not_verified, public_repository_state_not_verified, external_ci_run_not_observed, external_gpu_container_run_not_observed
